hooks.command:
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "Stop", "additionalContext": "MANDATORY SKILLS CHECKLIST — confirm each before marking any task done:
1. REMEMBER (/remember) — read memory.md at session start; write + commit after arch decisions, feature completions, or session end.
2. TRACK-ACTIONS — every user request has an ACT entry in actions.md with current status. Close with evidence link when done.
3. DEFINE-ACCEPTANCE-CRITERIA — ACs written and user-confirmed BEFORE coding. ACs live in the ACT item.
4. VERIFY-WORK — Mode A (Playwright against live app) for any UI/frontend change. Mode B (curl/GH Actions) for backend-only. CI passing does NOT satisfy Mode A. If Playwright is blocked by CCR proxy, state it explicitly — do not claim UAT passed.
5. VERIFIER AGENT — spawn Agent(subagent_type=verifier) after claiming done; it re-checks claims independently with no shared context.
6. DESIGN-LIBRARY-UAT — after any change to /upload, /extract, /save, /saved, or the extraction worker: run Path B microtests then uat-extract.yml workflow.

SKIP RULES: Any skip requires an explicit upfront alert to the user naming the skill and the reason before work begins. Never skip silently."}}'
